admin_routing_context_seed: Live routing context from production Cosmos: 13 destinations (jewel, cvs, pet_store, agora, gangnam_market, chewy, other, home_depot, whole_latte_love, srx, dirks_fishmarket, costco, walgreens) + 10 affinity rules (groceries->jewel, hardware->home_depot, meat->agora, coffee->whole_latte_love, cat food->chewy, toilet paper/paper towels/hand soap->cvs, tools->home_depot). golden_dataset_note: Classifier: 26 cases seeded (all prior runs show 26). admin.note: Pre-migration baseline captured 2026-05-11T04:52:40Z against deployed RC backend (asst_17oFXNHNq7kzmspQGMUrgERM, gpt-4o, agent-framework-azure-ai==1.0.0rc2). 11 cases: 8 task captures (expected=unrouted, 8/8 correct) + 3 errand captures (expected=jewel, 2/3 correct, one mispredicted to unrouted). Phase 24 Gate 6 (24-20) compares post-migration admin eval against this baseline using ±2pp tolerance.
